resources.string: Changes will take effect after restarting:\n%s
Select apps to hide from the launcher drawer
Show the Miku pet when in landscape orientation
Show the Miku pet when in portrait orientation
✗ Module is NOT active — please enable it in your Xposed manager
ℹ It is recommended to scope this module to com.android.launcher3 only.
Select which apps should be hidden from the launcher drawer. Accessible from Launcher Settings → Hide Icons.
Adds an "Allow rotation" toggle in Launcher Settings so the home screen can rotate with the device sensor.
When the Miku desktop pet theme is active, adds toggles in Launcher Settings to show or hide the pet separately in portrait and landscape orientations.
To manage settings, open Launcher → Settings → Hide Icons (or the rotation / Miku toggles).
